name: agrolease-backend
description: AgroLease mobile app API. Plain, portable, containerized Node/Fastify service - no platform-specific SDK baked in (Railway dropped project-wide; long-term direction is AWS, but not part of Task 1). This is a SEPARATE npm project from the repo root (same pattern as /scraper and /web) - running `npm install` at the repo root does NOT install these dependencies. Either `cd backend && npm install && npm run dev`, or from the repo root: `npm run backend:install` then `npm run backend:dev`.
